remarks: Experience luxury living in the heart of downtown Stamford from this beautifully appointed 14th-floor residence. Offering approximately 1,600 square feet of living space, Unit 14G features two spacious bedrooms, two-and-a-half baths, floor-to-ceiling windows with motorized shades, and a private balcony showcasing stunning city views.  The thoughtfully designed kitchen is highlighted by elegant white marble countertops, ample cabinetry, and an open layout ideal for everyday living and entertaining.  As a special offering, the seller is providing a professionally curated color consultation in collaboration with The Little Greene, giving the next owner the opportunity to personalize the kitchen by selecting a paint color for the cabinetry and island, professionally completed and paid for by the seller. Buyers will also have the opportunity to select a color option for the primary bath, creating a space that feels uniquely their own from day one.  Additional features include a private storage unit included in the deed, 24-hour concierge service, and access to exceptional amenities including a fitness center, indoor pool, resident lounge, and shared rooftop terrace.  Ideally situated in one of Stamford's fastest-growing neighborhoods, this residence offers convenient access to premier dining, shopping, entertainment, and transportation. A rare opportunity to enjoy luxury, personalization, and convenience in one of downtown Stamford's most desirable condominium communities.
